Sarath Sivakumar
Java Backend / Full Stack Developer | Spring Boot, Microservices

Professional Summary
Java Backend and Full Stack Developer with over two years of experience delivering enterprise grade applications
using Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, and modern frontend frameworks. Known for improving backend performance,
strengthening deployment reliability, and scaling systems used by thousands of users. Hands on experience with
microservices architecture, CI/CD automation, performance testing, and Agile delivery.
Core Skills
Languages: Java, Python, SQL, JavaScript, Dart
Backend Technologies: Spring Boot, REST APIs, Microservices Architecture, Spring Data JPA, Hibernate, JWT
Authentication, WebSockets, Keycloak
Frontend Technologies: React.js, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap
DevOps: Docker, Jenkins, CI/CD Pipelines, Git
Testing and Quality: JUnit, API Testing, Apache JMeter, SonarQube
Databases and Cache: PostgreSQL, Redis
Tools: Flutter, GitHub Copilot
Professional Experience

workflows.

functional screens.

standards.
